claim: DCCD improves strict structured accuracy by up to +24pp over standard constrained decoding (15.2% to 39.0% on GSM8K with a 1B model).
source: arXiv:2603.03305 — Draft-Conditioned Constrained Decoding for Structured Generation in LLMs
quote: DCCD improves strict structured accuracy by up to +24 percentage points over standard constrained decoding, and enables smaller model pairs to match or exceed much larger constrained baselines.

claim: Instagram carousel recommended size as of Jan 2026 is 1080x1350px (4:5). Maximum slides: 20. Max file size: 30MB. Grid crops to 3:4 centre zone.
quote: Size 1080 x 1350 px, Aspect Ratio 4:5 Recommended, Formats JPG, PNG, HEIC, Max File Size 30MB. Max slides 20 per post.

claim: TikTok carousel supports 2–35 images. Ideal file size ≤100KB. Optimal character count: 12-40 chars. Vertical resolution: 720x1280px.
quote: Image Requirements: min 2 max 35 images. JPG/.JPEG or .PNG. File size ≤100 KB suggested. Image resolution: 720x1280 (vertical).

claim: Constrained decoding frameworks compile JSON Schema into grammar artifacts (FSA/DFA) restricting valid tokens at each generation step, guaranteeing syntactically valid output.
source: arXiv:2602.12247v1 — Benchmark and Evaluation Methodology for Complex Structured Generation
quote: Each provider's constrained decoding mode supports only a subset of JSON Schema. Constrained sampling with compiled grammar artifacts (Anthropic description).

claim: PDL v1.0 +++DCCDSchemaGuard executes bifurcated inference: high-entropy semantic draft followed by zero-entropy guard pass via DFA logit-masking, guaranteeing 100% schema adherence.
source: PDL v1.0 Topological Decorators and Cognitive Bytecode Functions (Space file:3)
quote: Executes Draft-Conditioned Constrained Decoding (DCCD) by bifurcating inference into a high-entropy semantic draft followed by a zero-entropy guard pass via DFA logit-masking.

claim: +++AdjectivalBound prevents Semantic Saponification, Linguistic Overshadowing, and Attention Dilution by stripping excessive evaluative prose and substituting formal numerical constraints.
quote: Strips excessive evaluative prose via logit-masking; prevents spatial routing saturation when Entity Density exceeds 0.165.

claim: Symbolic Scars are VSA hypervectors minted from failure states; they exert repulsive mathematical forces on future generation paths via Failure-Informed Prompt Inversion (FIPI).
quote: Through Failure-Informed Prompt Inversion (FIPI), this spatial memory actively deflects the Tier 3 swarm's attention weights away from known historical logical traps.

claim: The Incremental Isolation Principle (IIP) yields 67.5% higher adherence to design specs when structural and aesthetic edits are decoupled. Structural adherence fails if prompt exceeds 3 distinct UI directives.
source: The Architect's Blueprint — AI-Driven UI Synthesis (Space file:2)
quote: Sequential editing yields a 67.5% higher adherence rate to design specs compared to monolithic prompting.

claim: Instagram feed shifted to preferring 3:4 (1080x1440px) ratio as of late 2025/2026. Old 4:5 format leaves screen real estate behind.
quote: As of late 2025 / 2026, Instagram quietly shifted the rules on feed... The new recommended maximum feed size: 1080×1440px (3:4).

claim: Schema First Tool APIs improve LLM agent reliability under strict interaction contracts vs prose documentation.
source: arXiv:2603.13404 — Schema First Tool APIs for LLM Agents
quote: This paper studies whether schema based tool contracts and structured validation diagnostics improve reliability under strict interaction.
